iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 18:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IAEA hidden HEU (460kg of 60%, enough for 11 bombs) remains the dominant factor. Gap between capability and intent persists — no weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test. Hegseth 'no quarter' rhetoric may reduce Iran's incentive to surrender conventional forces, indirectly increasing nuclear desperation calculus over time. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 18:00 — IMMINENT RISING. CRITICAL ESCALATION: (1) IRGC orders evacuation of Jebel Ali (Dubai), Khalifa Port (Abu Dhabi), and Fujairah — explicitly calling UAE ports 'origin of American enemy missiles' and 'legitimate targets' (CNN/Reuters/Al Jazeera). Direct threat to Gulf state territory unprecedented. (2) UAE intercepted 9 ballistic missiles + 33 drones from Iran Saturday — massive barrage (Al Jazeera). (3) Fujairah oil terminal fire — loading operations suspended (Reuters). One of world's largest bunkering hubs offline. (4) Trump calls on UK, China, France to send warships to Hormuz (Sky News/Guardian). (5) Trump vows to 'bomb the hell out of Iran shoreline' (Independent). (6) Hegseth 'no quarter, no mercy' — violates Geneva Conventions, analysts say (NYT/Guardian/HuffPost). Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 18:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios/ToI: 'Massive' ground invasion confirmed — to seize entire area south of Litani. Senior Israeli official: 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' (Al Bawaba/Axios). (2) Guardian: 'Entire families wiped out and towns emptied.' 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced. (3) Strikes on Nabatieh kill 7, Hara Sayda apartment building kill 4 (Türkiye Today). (4) Egypt and France diplomatic efforts intensify — no ceasefire in sight. (5) Hezbollah vows 'existential' fight (Al Jazeera). Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new intercepts reported since third confirmed March 13. Still one intercept from Article 4 consultations. NATO remains 'vigilant.' Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Sustained at 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India strongly condemned Pakistan airstrikes on Afghanistan. Iran allowed Indian ships to pass Hormuz in 'rare exception' — diplomatic channel still open. No military escalation signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No major new developments this scan. Trump sanctions waiver still in effect. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil while selling at discount. Ukraine front continues with 430 drone + 68 missile attack from earlier today. 42 (stable).

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. Trump calls on China to send warships to Hormuz — unusual public request. China has not responded. Warplane flights near Taiwan remain low (7 in two weeks). China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan (Wang Yi calls). Strategic patience continues. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed by Japan MoD and SK JCS from Sunan. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. 'Unprecedented pace' (JCS). No new signals beyond already-captured barrage. Japan confirms 340km range into Sea of Japan. 41 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 430 drones + 68 missiles attack earlier today (AP/Independent). Brovary near Kyiv struck, railway workshops hit. Zelenskyy warns ME war drawing anti-aircraft missiles from Ukraine. Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day. Ceasefund by end March at 2% (Polymarket). 56 + 5 (coupling) = 61.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 18:00. (1) Afghanistan claims its border forces killed 14 Pakistani soldiers and captured a Pakistani post in Kunar/Nangarhar provinces (Newsday/LA Times). If confirmed, major escalation. (2) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilians (Hindu/LA Times). (3) Pakistan strikes hit Kabul fuel depot near Kandahar airport — Kam Air fuel depot burning (Reuters). (4) Afghan MoD claims operations along Durand Line 'heavy losses' inflicted (Tribune India). (5) China mediation ongoing — Wang Yi urged both sides. War continues despite diplomatic pressure. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 + 2 + 8 + 8 (Afghan claim kills) - 4 (China mediation) = 69. Adjusted to 80 based on ground occupation expansion + civilian casualties compound.

FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL HIT BY IRANIAN DRONES — fire breaks out, loading operations suspended — one of world's largest bunkering hubs offline (Reuters/NDTV/CNN)
TRUMP CALLS ON UK, CHINA, FRANCE TO SEND WARSHIPS TO HORMUZ — 'many countries' will help keep strait open (Sky News/Guardian)
HEGSETH DECLARES 'NO QUARTER, NO MERCY' FOR IRAN — analysts and rights groups say it's a war crime under Geneva Conventions (NYT/Guardian/HuffPost/Al Jazeera)
AFGHANISTAN CLAIMS KILLED 14 PAKISTANI SOLDIERS AND CAPTURED BORDER POST — major escalation if confirmed (Newsday/LA Times/Tribune India)
ISRAEL 'MASSIVE' LEBANON GROUND INVASION CONFIRMED — senior official: 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza' — seize entire area south of Litani (Axios/ToI/Al Bawaba)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NO DE-ESCALATION. Day 15 18:00 SCAN. Global war probability IMMINENT (75%, up from 74%). SEVEN trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (80, up from 77), Turkey (65/71 with coupling). THREE trackers CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). MAJOR ESCALATION: IRGC directly threatening UAE ports and ordering civilian evacuation — first explicit threat to attack a Gulf state's territory. This is the sharpest escalation since the war began. Fujairah oil terminal offline. Trump calling for international naval coalition. Hegseth 'no quarter' declaration hardening positions on both sides. WATCH: (a) UAE retaliatory cycle — Iran strikes Gulf ports → Trump retaliates against Kharg → Iran escalates further. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 consultations. (c) Lebanon ground invasion launch timing. (d) DPRK nuclear test during 'unprecedented' missile pace. (e) Pakistan-Afghanistan: Afghan claim of killing 14 Pakistani soldiers — if confirmed, triggers major Pakistani response. (f) China response to Trump's Hormuz warship request. (g) Oil price trajectory — Brent likely spiking above $120 with Fujairah offline.

latest_news.headline: IRGC orders evacuation of Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Fujairah ports — calls UAE 'legitimate targets'
latest_news.text: IRGC issued circular ordering UAE residents to evacuate Jebel Ali (Dubai), Khalifa Port (Abu Dhabi), and Mina Al-Fujairah. Statement: 'targets the origin of American enemy missiles in shipping ports, docks and hideouts of American soldiers in UAE cities.' Unprecedented direct threat to Gulf state territory.

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 9 ballistic missiles + 33 drones from Iran in massive barrage
latest_news.text: UAE air defences intercepted 9 Iranian ballistic missiles and 33 drones on Saturday. Combined 42-projectile barrage represents Iran's largest attack on Gulf state territory since the war began.

latest_news.headline: Fujairah oil terminal struck by Iranian drones — loading operations suspended
latest_news.text: Iranian drone strike on Fujairah port triggered massive fire at oil storage facilities. One of world's largest bunkering hubs. Some oil-loading operations suspended. UAE authorities assessing damage.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls on UK, China, France to send warships to Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump publicly called on China, France, UK and 'many countries' to send warships to help keep the Strait of Hormuz open. 'Many countries will be sending ships.' No confirmed commitments from named nations.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth declares 'no quarter, no mercy' for Iran — analysts call it war crime
latest_news.text: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said US forces would provide 'no quarter, no mercy' for Iran. Legal experts and rights groups say this violates the Geneva Conventions — refusal to accept surrender is a war crime. Guardian editorial: 'worse than a mistake; it's a crime.'

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan claims killed 14 Pakistani soldiers, captured border post
latest_news.text: Afghanistan's MoD claims border forces in Kunar and Nangarhar provinces killed 14 Pakistani soldiers and captured a Pakistani military post. If confirmed, this is a major escalation of the Pakistan-Afghanistan war.

latest_news.headline: Israel 'massive' Lebanon ground invasion confirmed — 'do what we did in Gaza'
latest_news.source: Axios / Times of Israel / Al Bawaba
latest_news.text: Senior Israeli official told Axios: 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' Israel planning to seize entire area south of Litani River. 'Largest since 2006.' US and Israeli officials confirmed. Egypt and France diplomatic efforts intensifying but no ceasefire.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes hit Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar airport — fire reported
latest_news.text: Thick black smoke rose at private airline Kam Air's fuel depot after Pakistani airstrike near Kandahar airport. Taliban reported civilian casualties. Part of ongoing 'Operation Ghazab lil Haq.'

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 75% IMMINENT (Day 15 18:00). SEVEN trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (80 ↑), Turkey (65/71). THREE trackers CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). THIS HOUR: (1) IRGC DIRECTLY THREATENS UAE — orders evacuation of Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Fujairah ports. Calls them 'legitimate targets.' This is the sharpest escalation of the entire war — Iran openly threatening to attack Gulf state territory. (2) UAE intercepted 9 ballistic missiles + 33 drones in massive Iranian barrage. (3) Fujairah oil terminal — one of world's largest — hit by drones, loading suspended. Oil supply disruption. (4) Trump calls on UK, China, France to send warships to Hormuz. International naval coalition forming? (5) Hegseth 'no quarter, no mercy' — war crime designation hardening Iranian resolve. No incentive to surrender. (6) Afghanistan claims killed 14 Pakistani soldiers at border post. If confirmed, major escalation. (7) Pakistan strikes Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar. (8) Israel 'massive' Lebanon ground invasion — 'do what we did in Gaza.' WATCH: (a) UAE retaliatory spiral — Iran strikes Gulf → Trump retaliates → Iran escalates. Point of no return approaching. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 consultations. (c) Lebanon ground invasion launch — any hour. (d) DPRK nuclear test risk during 'unprecedented' missile pace. (e) China response to Trump's Hormuz warship request. (f) Oil price trajectory — Brent likely $120+ with Fujairah offline. (g) Pakistan-Afghanistan: Afghan soldier kill claim confirmation — potential trigger for major Pakistani response.
